raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX I purchased a SERVICE from XXXX  for {$750.00} using my Barclay 's credit card. The website did not have any refund or return policy on it when I made the purchase. I scheduled the service for XX/XX/XXXX. I cancelled the scheduled service on XX/XX/XXXX and I requested a refund from the seller. The seller and the website both refused my request. I still have not received the service. On or around XX/XX/XXXX I initiated a dispute with my credit card and provided all the above information. Some time in XXXX I received a call from Barclay 's asking me very basic questions, such as when I made the purchase and when I cancelled the service and whether I received the service and I answered all of their questions clearly. I recently checked the status of this dispute and found that it was resolved in favor of the merchant, which is outrageous because I paid for a service which I never received and I cancelled the service a week before it was scheduled to take place. XXXX has also revoked my access to the service so that now, even though I paid for it, I can not rebook it even if I wanted to and it's also impossible for me to leave a review for the seller. I called asking why the dispute was resolved against me on XX/XX/XXXX and the person I spoke with named " XXXX '' claimed that it was resolved against me because I did not reply to the merchant rebuttal, but I NEVER RECEIVED THE MERCHANT REBUTTAL and I never had an opportunity to provide a response. They won't even tell me what the merchant rebuttal says, yet I have emails which clearly show I cancelled the service well before the scheduled date and that the merchant outright refused a refund.
